hero.description: I craft robust web interfaces with meticulous attention to detail. Passionate about building performant, accessible, and beautiful web applications.

about.heading: The Architect Behind The Code
about.bio1: A passionate Front-End Developer dedicated to turning complex ideas into seamless, interactive digital interfaces. My approach combines technical precision with creative problem-solving to build unique user experiences.
about.bio2: I focus on building modern, performant, and scalable web applications. I pay close attention to every detail in the codebase to ensure fluid interactions, high performance, and robust architecture.

timeline.desc1: First line of HTML written, sparking a lifelong passion for programming.
timeline.desc2: Built websites for local businesses while studying computer science.
timeline.desc3: Sharpening programming skills through computer science studies while building robust, real-world web applications.
timeline.desc4: Crafting fast, responsive, and seamless web applications using modern front-end tech to deliver top-tier user experiences.
